apps/playground/app/app.vue.zh: 串联宠物工坊、预设、场景和物种页面的全局导航入口。
apps/playground/app/app.vue.en: Provides global navigation across the pet studio, presets, scenes, and species pages.

apps/playground/app/components/studio/Cl.zh: 装配通用宠物预览、自动相机、灯光和独立场景特效。
apps/playground/app/components/studio/Cl.en: Assembles the generic pet preview, automatic camera, lighting, and independent scene effects.

apps/playground/app/components/studio/Cu.zh: 根据外观配方渲染云狐专属身体、部件、尾巴、触角和标志。
apps/playground/app/components/studio/Cu.en: Renders Cloud Fox-specific body, parts, tail, antennae, and symbols from an appearance recipe.

apps/playground/app/components/studio/Mo.zh: 渲染月猫专属外形、胡须、额头标志、卷曲尾巴和动作降级结果。
apps/playground/app/components/studio/Mo.en: Renders Moon Cat-specific form, whiskers, forehead mark, curled tail, and resolved motions.

apps/playground/app/components/studio/Pe.zh: 渲染不参与宠物包围盒计算的光晕、粒子和地面阴影。
apps/playground/app/components/studio/Pe.en: Renders halo, particles, and ground shadow without contributing to pet bounds.

apps/playground/app/components/studio/Pr.zh: 根据物种注册信息将通用预览分发到对应宠物渲染器。
apps/playground/app/components/studio/Pr.en: Dispatches the generic preview to the appropriate pet renderer using species registration.

apps/playground/app/domain/pet-scene.ts.zh: 定义宠物场景配方、内置场景、网页对比和动作联动规则。
apps/playground/app/domain/pet-scene.ts.en: Defines pet scene recipes, built-in scenes, web contrast, and action-linked rules.

apps/playground/app/domain/pet-species-r.zh: 定义物种注册表、月猫特有槽位、跨物种风格映射和动作降级。
apps/playground/app/domain/pet-species-r.en: Defines the species registry, Moon Cat-specific slots, cross-species style mapping, and motion fallback.

apps/playground/app/domain/pet-studio-ph.zh: 扩展宠物工坊头部部件、组合触角和最多八段的参数化尾巴。
apps/playground/app/domain/pet-studio-ph.en: Extends Pet Studio with head parts, composable antennae, and a parameterized tail of up to eight segments.

apps/playground/app/domain/pet-studio-ph.zh: 定义 schema v2、独立标志通道、派生颜色、旧配方迁移和外观检查。
apps/playground/app/domain/pet-studio-ph.en: Defines schema v2, independent symbol channels, derived colors, legacy migration, and appearance audits.

apps/playground/app/domain/pet-studio-ph.zh: 定义内置预设、风格规则、局部应用和锁定随机生成。
apps/playground/app/domain/pet-studio-ph.en: Defines built-in presets, style rules, scoped application, and locked randomization.

apps/playground/app/pages/studio-presets.zh: 提供预设、风格、应用范围、参数锁定和用户方案管理界面。
apps/playground/app/pages/studio-presets.en: Provides the presets, styles, application scope, parameter locks, and user scheme interface.

apps/playground/app/pages/studio-scenes..zh: 提供场景预设、网页对比、光晕、粒子、阴影和动作联动编辑界面。
apps/playground/app/pages/studio-scenes..en: Provides editing for scene presets, web contrast, halo, particles, shadows, and action linking.

apps/playground/app/pages/studio-species.zh: 提供物种选择、月猫特有部件和动作降级验证界面。
apps/playground/app/pages/studio-species.en: Provides species selection, Moon Cat-specific parts, and motion fallback validation.

apps/playground/app/pages/studio.vue.zh: 提供宠物外观、尾巴触角、标志、发光、撤销重做和穿模检查主编辑器。
apps/playground/app/pages/studio.vue.en: Provides the main editor for pet appearance, tail and antennae, symbols, glow, undo/redo, and collision checks.

apps/playground/app/stores/pet-appearanc.zh: 管理多物种外观、场景、历史记录、预设、随机锁定和本地持久化。
apps/playground/app/stores/pet-appearanc.en: Manages multi-species appearance, scenes, history, presets, randomization locks, and local persistence.
